title: Amara's Sound Adventure
synopsis: Join Amara as she discovers different sounds around her home, counting from one to five while exploring the musical world of everyday noises.

pages.text: Meet Amara! She loves to listen to sounds. Let's count sounds with her!

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits on a colorful rug, surrounded by gentle rainbow waves floating in the air representing various sounds
illustration.alt: A young girl with braids sitting and listening to colorful sound waves

pages.text: ONE clock goes TICK TOCK! The sound makes blue circles dance.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes points to a wall clock, with blue circular ripples emanating from it in rhythmic patterns
illustration.alt: Girl pointing at a clock with blue sound circles

pages.text: TWO birds chirp TWEET TWEET! Yellow dots bounce up and down.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes looks out a window at two birds, with bright yellow dotted lines bouncing between them
illustration.alt: Girl watching birds with yellow bouncing sound dots

pages.text: THREE drums go BOOM BOOM BOOM! Red jagged lines jump everywhere.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits near three colorful drums, with bold red jagged lightning-like lines exploding outward from each drum
illustration.alt: Girl near drums with red jagged sound lines

pages.text: FOUR cats meow MEOW softly. Pink wavy ribbons float gently.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes pets four fluffy cats, with soft pink wavy ribbons flowing gracefully around them
illustration.alt: Girl petting cats with pink wavy sound ribbons

pages.text: FIVE bells ring DING DING! Golden stars sparkle and twinkle all around.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes holds small bells, with golden star-shaped bursts of light twinkling throughout the scene
illustration.alt: Girl holding bells with golden star-shaped sounds

pages.text: Amara loves all the sounds! Can you count them with her? One, two, three, four, five!

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes claps happily as all the sound shapes - blue circles, yellow dots, red jagged lines, pink ribbons, and golden stars - swirl together in a joyful rainbow symphony around her
illustration.alt: Girl celebrating surrounded by all different colored sound shapes

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: What color are the clock sounds?
questions.explanation: The clock makes blue circles when it goes tick tock!

questions.question: How many birds chirp in the story?
questions.explanation: Two birds chirp tweet tweet with yellow dots!

questions.question: What shape do the bell sounds make?
questions.explanation: The bells make golden stars that sparkle and twinkle!
